goal: Repair ElevenLabs TTS on a free-tier account. Three bugs: (a) model eleven_monolingual_v1 deprecated on free tier, switch to eleven_flash_v2_5; (b) output_format pcm_44100 is Pro-only, switch to mp3_44100_128; (c) SDK response field is audio_base_64 with underscore, not audio_base64. Default voice swapped from Rachel (library, paid) to Sarah (premade, free). Playback now decodes mp3 via miniaudio before sounddevice.
